name: Covanta Holding Corporation
description: Covanta Holding Corporation is a leading global provider of sustainable waste and energy solutions. The company's primary business is Waste-to-Energy, which converts municipal solid waste into clean, renewable energy, reducing greenhouse gas emissions and diverting waste from landfills. Covanta operates a network of waste-to-energy facilities, primarily in North America, and also provides comprehensive industrial waste management services, recycling, and other environmental solutions to communities and businesses.
